notes: Iter 23: SIGNAL-DRIVEN CASH PROTECTION. Enable CASH in R1 simplex but force R1 base CASH=0 (R1 base stays TQQQ-heavy). Force R1 protection CASH ≥ 0.6 raw → when signal turns weak (≤ -1 or -2), strategy de-risks DIRECTLY to CASH-dominant allocation, BEFORE the dd_t1 regime threshold is crossed. This decouples DD from dd_t1 width — wider R1 (14-17%) for more compounding, but protection-mode CASH for fast de-risk. R1 upside still TQQQ/QQQ/XLU only (no CASH on bull signals). Hypothesis: this breaks below -35% DD while preserving CAGR ~30%.
